name: 24pc (Set of 12) Tritan Plastic Food Storage Container Set with Lids Clear - Figmint™: Stackable, Microwave-Safe
description:
Meal prep or store leftovers for the whole family with this 24-Piece (Set of 12) Plastic Food Storage Container Set with Lids from Figmint™. This set includes twelve clear, BPA-free rectangular food storage containers in different sizes, all of which come with latching lids with four locking tabs. The containers' stackable, nestable design with slight tapered edges offers space-saving storage, and they're top rack dishwasher safe and microwave safe without lids for reheating.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
